Name: Percentage of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection occurrences across all cases
Percentage of variants that include SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all cases

Name: Number of times SW-Initial Reviewer Selection is immediately followed by SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week
Metric: Number of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection activities that eventually lead to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Frequency of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection compared to SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: Number of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' activities for cases where activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' occurs

Name: Percentage of cases where SW-Initial Reviewer Selection occurs before SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Number of variants in which SW-Initial Reviewer Selection appears only once
Percentage of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection activities that are followed by at least one reviewer-related reminder (e.g., Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 or 2)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Frequency of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection in cases that ultimately result in SW-EIC Accept versus SW-EIC Reject
Metric: Number of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' activities for cases where activity 'SW-EIC Accept' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection occurrences that are not followed by any SW-Reviewer Agreed within the same case
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all cases where 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' does not happen

Name: Number of times SW-Initial Reviewer Selection is succeeded by SW-Reviewer Declined without an intermediate SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Number of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection activities occurring in cases with more than three reviewer assignment attempts
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection relative to the total number of reviewer-related activities (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, SW-Reviewer No Response, SW-Reviewer Unavailable)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' occurs

Name: Percentage of cases where SW-Initial Reviewer Selection is directly followed by a delay-indicating activity (e.g., SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week, SW-Reviewer Selection is now due, or SW-Reviewer Selection is 1 week late)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week'
